[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A split scene shows two dark-clad people standing on a plain light background while one crouches on the ground, with their faces covered by rectangular flags.

Main Subject:
On the left, a person stands upright in a dark suit with hands down at their sides, facing toward the right; on the right, another person is crouched on the floor with one hand near the ground and their head lowered forward, both faces obscured by small rectangular flag overlays.

Setting:
The background is a plain light gray to off-white gradient with no visible furniture or scenery, suggesting a studio or graphic backdrop; the lighting is soft and even.

Visual Details:
The standing figure wears a black jacket and matching black trousers, with dark shoes; their posture is relaxed, with their head turned slightly to the right. The crouching figure wears a dark gray or black suit jacket and trousers with dark shoes, leaning forward with bent legs and arms close to their body. Small curved marks resembling debris or motion flecks appear in the upper left and upper right portions of the image. The composition is vertical, with the standing person occupying the left half and the crouching person on the right foreground, viewed from a straight-on camera angle at about standing height.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image depicts one person standing in a dark outfit while another person crouches and leans forward on a plain background. Both people’s faces are covered by rectangular flag graphics.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan dua karakter bergaya anime. Satu karakter berdiri tegak, mengenakan pakaian hitam dan memiliki bendera Spanyol yang menutupi wajahnya. Karakter lainnya berlutut dengan satu tangan di tanah, mengenakan seragam abu-abu dengan bendera Portugal menutupi wajahnya. Latar belakangnya polos dan berwarna terang. Tidak ada konten NSFW atau ketelanjangan dalam gambar ini.
